advisory.title: ASA-2025-003: Groups module can halt chain when handling a malicious proposal
advisory.description: Cosmos SDK advisory ASA-2025-003 covers a divide-by-zero condition in the x/group module that halts the chain when a malicious proposal is processed. Any user with access to the groups module can introduce the failing state. The v0.50.11..v0.50.12 patch modifies x/group/keeper/msg_server.go and x/group/types.go to validate the divisor path. Affects v0.47.0–v0.47.15 and v0.50.0–v0.50.11; fixed in v0.47.16 and v0.50.12.

introducingCommits.subject: feat: Add server implementation of Group module (#10570)

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v0.50.11 release commit, the last vulnerable release on the v0.50 line before the v0.50.12 patch. The v0.50.11..v0.50.12 patch (commit 9816440893 'Merge commit from fork') modifies x/group/keeper/msg_server.go and x/group/types.go. The introducing commit is the server implementation of the group module, the same commit referenced by the related GHSA-47ww-ff84-4jrg case.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag the divide-by-zero pattern in x/group/keeper/msg_server.go and x/group/types.go where a malicious proposal payload can drive a divisor to zero in the tally path and halt the chain.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ASA-2025-003 (GHSA-x5vx-95h7-rv4p) was published on 2025-02-20 with patches in cosmos-sdk v0.47.16 and v0.50.12.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v0.50.11 release commit, the latest tag in the >=0.50.0,<=0.50.11 vulnerable range.
